Android Studio editor showing AndroidManifest.xml with an <activity> tag for '.DeepLinkActivity' (or 'com.example.shopeasy.DeepLinkActivity').

task_completion.description: Add intent filter with VIEW action and DEFAULT/BROWSABLE categories
task_completion.visual_evidence: Inside the DeepLinkActivity tag in AndroidManifest.xml, an <intent-filter> containing <action android:name="android.intent.action.VIEW" />, <category android:name="android.intent.category.DEFAULT" />, and <category android:name="android.intent.category.BROWSABLE" />.

task_completion.description: Configure intent filter data with correct scheme, host, and path prefix
task_completion.visual_evidence: Inside the <intent-filter> in AndroidManifest.xml, a <data> tag with android:scheme="https", android:host="shopeasy.example.com", and android:pathPrefix="/product".
